title: Earnings Call Transcript: Blink Charging Q1 2026 Shows Improved EPS
text: Blink Charging Q1 2026 earnings call transcript shows improved EPS of -$0.06 versus estimates of -$0.09, driving stock surge. Revenue of $20.78 million missed expectations of $22.10 million by about 6%. Service revenues grew 25% year-over-year to $13.3 million, now representing 64% of total quarterly revenue. Company deployed 27 new DC fast-charging sites with 136 stalls during Q1. Management expects revenue growth to accelerate as more DC fast charging sites become operational, supporting higher utilization rates and improved asset returns. Full-year 2026 revenue guidance remains $105 million to $115 million with gross margins of approximately 35%. Company maintains debt-free balance sheet with $38 million in cash. Analyst consensus shows 6 analysts covering stock with Buy rating and average price target of $2.13. Stock rose 8.5% in after-hours trading on earnings beat and margin improvement.
